title: Epic Armor Visibility
description: A mod that supports hiding armor for the Epic Fight mod.
body:
# Epic Armor Visibility
Do you want to see your cool skin while fighting enemies in the [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) mod? This mod can help you!

## What does this mod do?
This mod hides all equipped armor (including elytra and carved pumpkins) when the player switches to combat mode.  
The mod only modifies client-side rendering, so it does not work on the server.  
Note: It only stops rendering; your equipment remains effective!  

## Configuration
This mod can be used together with the [Armor Visibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-visibility) mod to enable the functionality of hiding armor on the vanilla model and configurable options for hiding specific parts.  
If the Armor Visibility mod is not installed, it will only hide all armor on the Epic Fight model.
